Intro: [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]

Verse:
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
I've gotta take a little time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
A little time to think things over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
I better read between the lines[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
In case I need it when I'm older[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Oooohhhh[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Now this mountain I must climb[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]
Feels like the world upon my shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Through the clouds I see love shine[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
It keeps me warm as life grows colder[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]C/A[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C/A[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
In my life  there's been heartache and pain.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/A[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D/A[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't know if I can face it again.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/A[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]D/A[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]
 Can't stop now.  I've traveled so far to change this lonely life.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] *2* [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]     *2*
  I want to know what love is.       I want you to show me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] *2* [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch] *1* [ch]Em[/ch] *1*
  I want to feel what love is.       I know you can show me.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
I'm gonna take a little time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]
A little time to look around me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I've got nowhere left to hide[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
It looks like love has finally found me[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]C/A[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C/A[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]

 Can't stop now.  I've traveled so far to change this lonely life.[/tab]

  I want to know what love is.       I want you to show me.[/tab]
